name: ahre-cli
description: AhRE - ArcHitecture Recipe Engine CLI with mandatory .agents skill bootstrap, deterministic recipes, logic slots, semantic inventory, graph, search, and build planning

scripts.smoke: node ./bin/ahre.mjs intents list --json && node ./bin/ahre.mjs skill list --all --json && node ./bin/ahre.mjs recipe plan entity.capability.ensure --entity User --context Users --json && node ./bin/ahre.mjs graph build --json
